urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Trump imposes 50% tariff on Canadian imports
latest.summary: US President Donald Trump has imposed a 50% tariff on a wide range of goods imported from Canada. The duties take effect within 30 days and are a response to what Trump calls 'unequal treatment' of US products.
latest.details: US President Donald Trump has imposed a 50% tariff on a wide range of goods imported from Canada. The duties take effect within 30 days and are a response to what Trump calls 'unequal treatment' of US products. The tariffs will affect various consumer and industrial goods, but key exports like energy and fish will be exempt. This move escalates existing trade tensions and builds on previous tariffs already in place.
latest.full_brief: US President Donald Trump has imposed a 50% tariff on a wide range of goods imported from Canada. The duties take effect within 30 days and are a response to what Trump calls 'unequal treatment' of US products. The tariffs will affect various consumer and industrial goods, but key exports like energy and fish will be exempt. This move escalates existing trade tensions and builds on previous tariffs already in place.

latest.title: Yemen's Houthis announce 'maritime embargo' on Saudi Arabia
latest.summary: Yemen's Houthis have announced a 'maritime embargo' against Saudi Arabia. This embargo is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Houthi-controlled north-western Yemen.
latest.details: Yemen's Houthis have announced a 'maritime embargo' against Saudi Arabia. This embargo is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Houthi-controlled north-western Yemen. The Houthi military spokesman stated that the embargo would begin immediately. The Bab al-Mandab Strait, a crucial waterway, is being closed to Saudi vessels as part of this action.
latest.full_brief: Yemen's Houthis have announced a 'maritime embargo' against Saudi Arabia. This embargo is a response to a Saudi blockade of ports and airports in Houthi-controlled north-western Yemen. The Houthi military spokesman stated that the embargo would begin immediately. The Bab al-Mandab Strait, a crucial waterway, is being closed to Saudi vessels as part of this action.

latest.title: Notorious drug cartel leader Ismael Zambada sentenced to life in US prison
latest.summary: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was also ordered to pay $15 billion in restitution for his role in drug trafficking.
latest.details: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was also ordered to pay $15 billion in restitution for his role in drug trafficking. Zambada was arrested in Texas after being lured there in a sting operation.
latest.full_brief: Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada has been sentenced to life in prison by a US judge. He was also ordered to pay $15 billion in restitution for his role in drug trafficking. Zambada was arrested in Texas after being lured there in a sting operation.

latest.title: 'If only people knew what a tick could do' - the deadly meat allergies caused by tick bites
latest.summary: Myfanwy Webb reflects on her son's birthday party five years ago, which she now views as a missed opportunity to save his life. After a celebratory lunch, her son Jeremy experienced difficulty breathing and vomiting, leading to a hospital visit.
latest.details: Myfanwy Webb reflects on her son's birthday party five years ago, which she now views as a missed opportunity to save his life. After a celebratory lunch, her son Jeremy experienced difficulty breathing and vomiting, leading to a hospital visit. Doctors suspected a meat allergy but attributed his symptoms to asthma, ultimately sending him home without further testing. Tragically, Jeremy died a year later from anaphylaxis triggered by a tick-induced meat allergy, marking the first known death from this condition.
latest.full_brief: Myfanwy Webb reflects on her son's birthday party five years ago, which she now views as a missed opportunity to save his life. After a celebratory lunch, her son Jeremy experienced difficulty breathing and vomiting, leading to a hospital visit. Doctors suspected a meat allergy but attributed his symptoms to asthma, ultimately sending him home without further testing. Tragically, Jeremy died a year later from anaphylaxis triggered by a tick-induced meat allergy, marking the first known death from this condition.

latest.title: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
latest.summary: Thousands of supporters of the Cockroach Janta Party attempted to march on India's parliament. Police used tear gas and canes to disperse the crowds in central Delhi.
latest.details: Thousands of supporters of the Cockroach Janta Party attempted to march on India's parliament. Police used tear gas and canes to disperse the crowds in central Delhi. The protest movement seeks education and employment reforms amid allegations of a crisis in the education system.
latest.full_brief: Thousands of supporters of the Cockroach Janta Party attempted to march on India's parliament. Police used tear gas and canes to disperse the crowds in central Delhi. The protest movement seeks education and employment reforms amid allegations of a crisis in the education system.

latest.title: Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
latest.summary: Sony Music Entertainment has filed a lawsuit against Udio for infringing the copyright of over 30,000 songs. The lawsuit claims that this list is only a small portion of the works that Udio has allegedly infringed.
latest.details: Sony Music Entertainment has filed a lawsuit against Udio for infringing the copyright of over 30,000 songs. The lawsuit claims that this list is only a small portion of the works that Udio has allegedly infringed. UMG and Warner Music Group have settled with Udio and are now partnering with the company. Sony is seeking to block Udio from infringing its works and is asking for up to $150,000 per work infringed.
latest.full_brief: Sony Music Entertainment has filed a lawsuit against Udio for infringing the copyright of over 30,000 songs. The lawsuit claims that this list is only a small portion of the works that Udio has allegedly infringed. UMG and Warner Music Group have settled with Udio and are now partnering with the company. Sony is seeking to block Udio from infringing its works and is asking for up to $150,000 per work infringed.

latest.title: Nicaragua’s president says country will not hold any more elections
latest.summary: Nicaragua's President Daniel Ortega announced that the country will not hold any more elections. He stated that this decision is intended to prevent the opposition from seizing power.
latest.details: Nicaragua's President Daniel Ortega announced that the country will not hold any more elections. He stated that this decision is intended to prevent the opposition from seizing power. Ortega has been in office since 2007 and described the move as building a 'wall' against opposition forces. His announcement was made during a ceremony commemorating the 47th anniversary of the Sandinista revolution.
latest.full_brief: Nicaragua's President Daniel Ortega announced that the country will not hold any more elections. He stated that this decision is intended to prevent the opposition from seizing power. Ortega has been in office since 2007 and described the move as building a 'wall' against opposition forces. His announcement was made during a ceremony commemorating the 47th anniversary of the Sandinista revolution.

latest.title: Thousands of websites taken down for illegal World Cup streams
latest.summary: More than 1,000 domains were shut down in the US during the World Cup for illegal streaming. The enforcement actions were part of investigations named 'operation offsides' and 'operation red card.
latest.details: More than 1,000 domains were shut down in the US during the World Cup for illegal streaming. The enforcement actions were part of investigations named 'operation offsides' and 'operation red card.' The DOJ reported that the illegal streaming of sports costs companies billions of dollars annually. In Colombia, several arrests were made in connection with illegal access to World Cup games.
latest.full_brief: More than 1,000 domains were shut down in the US during the World Cup for illegal streaming. The enforcement actions were part of investigations named 'operation offsides' and 'operation red card.' The DOJ reported that the illegal streaming of sports costs companies billions of dollars annually. In Colombia, several arrests were made in connection with illegal access to World Cup games.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
